results.rendered_html:
mathita 1〉 partic. adj. s. u. 1. math.
— 2〉 m. N. pr. eines Abkömmlings Yamaʼs und angeblichen Verfassers von  ṚV. 10,19 .
— 3〉 n. Buttermilch ohne Wasserzusatz  AK. 2,9,53 .  H. 409 . an. 3,285 .  MED. t. 141. fg.   HALĀY. 2,120 .  KAUŚ. 25 . 35 . 39 .  MBH. 8,2044 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 50,25 . 26 . yattu sasnehamajalaṃ mathitaṃ gholamucyate  SUŚR. 1,179,6 .

results.rendered_html:
mathita p. p. [math-kta]
1 Churned, stirred round, agitated, shaken about.
2 Crushed, ground, pinched.
3 Afflicted, distressed, oppressed.
4 Killed, destroyed.
5 Dislocated; (see maṃth).
— taṃ Pure butter-milk (without water).
